channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Ceasefire in the Iran war teeters in the face of disagreements over Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz - AP News
item.description:
1. Ceasefire in the Iran war teeters in the face of disagreements over Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz  AP News
  2. Strait of Hormuz has immediately become the first major flash point of Trump's 'fragile' ceasefire  Yahoo Finance
  3. Iran threatens to end ceasefire over Hezbollah's exclusion from truce deal  Fox News
  4. Iran war day 41: What’s happening in Lebanon, Middle East and beyond?  Al Jazeera
  5. White House: Strait of Hormuz Closure 'Completely Unacceptable' Under Ceasefire  Time Magazine

item.title: UK says it deployed military to deter Russian submarines from attack on undersea cables - Reuters
item.description:
1. UK says it deployed military to deter Russian submarines from attack on undersea cables  Reuters
  2. Defence secretary reveals month-long Russian submarine operation over cables and pipelines north of UK  BBC
  3. 3 Russian Submarines Detected Near Britain Were Spying, U.K. Says  The New York Times
  4. If Putin feels need to send warship to escort tankers in Channel, UK policy ‘having an impact’, says Healey – UK politics live  The Guardian
  5. Military operation conducted to deter Russian submarines suspected of "malign activity" in North Atlantic  CBS News

item.title: 36 Hours of Chaos: The Scramble for a Cease-Fire in Iran - The New York Times
item.description:
1. 36 Hours of Chaos: The Scramble for a Cease-Fire in Iran  The New York Times
  2. Trump’s journey from ‘annihilation’ to ‘PEACE’ in one day rested on realization of a long-term battle to control Strait of Hormuz  Fortune
  3. Iran revealed a 10-point plan for peace with the US--Here's what's in it  Fox News
  4. 5 things to know for April 8: US-Iran ceasefire, Iran-linked hackers, ICE shooting, Hawaii flood threat, Missing American  CNN
  5. The cease-fire that wasn’t: Here’s why Trump and Iran never really agreed to the same terms  Fortune

item.title: UK rejects tolls on Strait of Hormuz - politico.eu
item.description:
1. UK rejects tolls on Strait of Hormuz  politico.eu

  4. Cooper urges full and toll-free reopening of Strait of Hormuz  BBC

item.title: Middle East war live: Europeans say ceasefire must include Lebanon - Financial Times
item.description:
1. Middle East war live: Europeans say ceasefire must include Lebanon  Financial Times

  4. Lebanon thought there was a ceasefire - then Israel unleashed deadly blitz  BBC
  5. Israel's attacks devastate Beirut and threaten U.S.-Iran ceasefire  NBC News

item.title: Trump’s Iran war widens rift with European nationalists once viewed as MAGA allies - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Russia’s internet crackdown leads to a spring of growing discontent - AP News
item.description:

item.title: Birmingham pastor charged after man drowned during baptism - BBC

item.title: France to increase defense spending by $42 billion, mulls new tank effort - Breaking Defense

item.title: Continuing Crisis in Strait of Hormuz: Why Iran’s Hold is Illegal and U.S. Military Force Alone Fails - Just Security
item.description:
1. Continuing Crisis in Strait of Hormuz: Why Iran’s Hold is Illegal and U.S. Military Force Alone Fails  Just Security

  4. From Oman, a waterfront view of the embattled Strait of Hormuz  The Washington Post
